content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Non-Coprime Partition". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1038/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n (1 ≤ n ≤ 100). The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an (1 ≤ ai ≤ 100).
content.outputFormat: Print the maximum number of elements that can be included in the subset.

solution.approach: Use a greedy approach to select the maximum number of non-coprime elements.
